mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_evaluate ( user_id, store_id, rating, taste_rating, service_rating, environment_rating, cost_performance_rating, content, images, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{rating}, #{tasteRating}, #{serviceRating}, #{environmentRating}, #{costPerformanceRating}, #{content}, #{images}, 1 )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_evaluate WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status = 1
AND rating >= 4 AND rating = 3 AND rating <= 2 AND images IS NOT NULL AND images != '[]'
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_evaluate WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_evaluate SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE tb_evaluate SET useful_count = useful_count + #{num} WHERE id = #{id}
